add_first_city: Add the first city of the route
cities_desc_1: List the cities in travel order
cities_desc_2: a card by the handle on the left, dates recalculate automatically from the trip start
created_desc: "{title}": {cities} {citiesWord}, {nights} {nightsWord}. You can now add hotels, transfers and activities.
date_required_hint: Set a date, otherwise dates won't be saved
err_no_cities: Add at least one city to the route
err_no_date: Set the trip start date, it cannot be saved without it
err_no_session: Your session expired. Sign in again.
err_save_failed: Could not save the trip. Try again.
final_point: This is the trip's final stop
final_point_hint: No return needed, the "Return" step is skipped
geo_hint: Allow location access, we'll detect your city automatically. You can decline and enter it manually.
geo_off_hint: Use the search above: type the name of a hub city or the nearest airport
home_desc: This is your home: the start point and (usually) the return point. From it Triplanio shows transfers and ticket prices.
limit_desc_post: . Wait for the current one to end or upgrade to Pro.
reset_confirm_desc: All the cities and settings you entered will be cleared — planning starts over.
return_city_ph: Where are you flying after the trip?
return_desc: Usually home, but sometimes it's handier to head to another place
return_home_desc_1: A standard return. Triplanio will add the return transfer from
return_info: You can leave it empty and add the return transfer later from the timeline
return_other_desc: If you're going further or heading to another place, say where
review_desc: Check that everything is in place. After saving, the trip appears in your collection and you can add details.
